case_title: KELLY, KIMBERLY VS CINGOLANI, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY KELLY, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT CINGOLANI, JOHN CINGOLANI, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-11-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-11-1998 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLY, KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CINGOLANI, JOHN CINGOLANI, PAUL $1,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,070.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO JOHN CINGOLANI RETURNED- NO SUCH STREET.
